action.reasoning: Observation: mean_r2 dropped from 0.5206 to 0.2958 with larger model + skip. All feature groups regressed. Analysis: (1) Skip connection maps input states directly to output tendencies - fundamentally different quantities, so skip adds noise. (2) Checkpoint saving based on val_r2 is dominated by noisy near-zero-variance features, may save suboptimal checkpoint. (3) Feature weighting (q_weight=2.0) may cause imbalance. Decision: Remove skip, save best checkpoint based on val_loss not val_r2, use moderate architecture (1024/8), equal loss weighting, train 25 epochs.
